reviews.review_msg: Very interesting. All of the students engaged.  I don't think anyone dropped out. Do your work, participate, ask questions and you will do well.

An AMAZING professor! I can attend lecture not take any notes but just be entranced in the lecture and learn so much! He truly wants you to learn things and inspires you to do so. Exams are very fair, assignments are very fair! I loved this course, and loved the way Dr. Mooers taught it. I highly recommend to take this class with him!!!!!!!
No Comments
Avoid Perkins at any cost.
Perkins gives assignments 1 day before u need to finish them. Last week sent something out over the weekend & expected us all to have it done by tutorial Monday.
Perkins  condescending & rude. ASKS WAY TOO MUCH. Not approachable. Dropped the class.
She is tough,  but an extremely good teacher.

Sensitive to students' needs and gave us extensions on a few big assignments. Energetic lecturer (good in a early morning class). Always very prepared. Clearly knows her stuff. Helpful during office hours. Clear (but somewhat strict) guidelines. Fair grader. The text was boring. Would recommend.

I had a rough time at first (proposal is super tough) but Sarah is helpful & supportive. Reassured & helped me fix it & figure it out. I've never been excited about papers but I enjoyed this one. It was interesting. Did well on paper & got proposal grade bumped up. Assignments  proposal, take home midterm, paper, & final. Tough but with worth it.
Loved Kolb. This class would have been impossible without her. If you have to take this class with Perkins try to get Kolb's tutorial.
This class was tough and the prof Perkins was unapproachable. Abby and Kevin (TAs) were great. They got me thru the class.
Tough grader but super helpful. Hope to have her again.
This was an interesting course.  Jennifer is clear and helfpul.  Uses overhead notes and emails them to the class.
Our midterm avg was 50% and he told us we were all stupid and he wouldn't scale.
True loser.  Can't teach.
The bst teaching skills in the whole department.  A super nice guy.
Great guy. He knows his stuff well. Fun lecture. Assignment are fair and related to the materials in the course.

Interesting class but prof has a tendency to lose it if someone says something she disagrees with. Be warned that she is a very very hard marker. But once  in a while she bends over and makes it all worthwhile.

This class felt like a waste of time. Kelly would often say an assignment would be posted on a certain date and it wouldn't be posted until a week later, and if you try to reach her by email good luck. After the Summit conference, she assigned us a 2-3 page essay during finals season due with like 3 days to write it. Wouldn't recommend, unorganized

I appreciate that we only had to come in once a month for the lecture, however, every topic was redundant and did not feel necessary at all. Kelly was also disorganized with the assignments and did not set clear timelines. The mandatory summit could have been an extra class during the week, it was not valuable enough to justify the Saturday drive.

tough course, unfair midterm questions. TAs always say your answer is not specific enough!! and give zero out of 10 mark!!    his notes are just summaries of the textbook with more pictures than explanations!!
